sql: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE (name = CONCAT(#{firstName}, ' ', #{lastName})) OR name LIKE CONCAT(#{firstName}, '%')
templateSql:
SELECT id, name FROM users
<where>
    <if test="firstName != null">
        <if test="lastName != null">
            AND name = CONCAT(#{firstName}, ' ', #{lastName})
        </if>
        <if test="firstName != ''">
            AND name LIKE CONCAT(#{firstName}, '%')
        </if>
    </if>
</where>
